compiled_state.title: Write structural boundary test for REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md huge-divert step and wire .test-index
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create `tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh` — structural boundary test verifying REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md references review-huge-diff-check.sh and REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md.

## Tasks
1. Create `tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh` with test function:
   - `test_review_workflow_has_huge_divert_step`: reads plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md and asserts:
     - File contains the string "review-huge-diff-check.sh"
     - File contains the string "REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md"
     - Both strings appear after the "## Step 2" section (i.e., Step 2b is between Step 2 and Step 3)
2. `chmod +x tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh`
3. Append to `.test-index`:
   `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md: tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh [test_review_workflow_has_huge_divert_step]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] test_review_workflow_has_huge_divert_step function is present
- [ ] .test-index entry appended with RED marker
- [ ] Test fails RED before Task 4 is executed
- Verify: `bash tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL` outputs 1

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-huge-divert.sh, .test-index. Tests: 3 assertions RED (REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lacks Step 2b content, expected).
